civilopediaText.text: Marks the center of a city
Appearance changes with the technological era of the owning civilization

name: Ice core
uniques: Ensures a minimum tile yield of [+2 Food, +1 Production]
Turn this tile into a [Nevermeltice] tile

name: Nevermeltice
uniques: [+1 Gold, +1 Food, +1 Production, +1 Culture, +1 Faith] <for [Permafrost] Civilizations>
Tile provides yield without assigned population <for [Permafrost] Civilizations>

civilopediaText.text: The land where only those touched by Winter may thrive.
Do note that Nevermeltice must be built next to each other.
